name: ai-competitor-comparison-brief-generator
description: Complete AI SaaS comparison brief generator for Nethi Mallikarjun Gupta.

scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: node free-ports.js && concurrently "npm run dev-backend" "npm run dev-frontend"
scripts.start-frontend: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run preview --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
